title: More Heroquest? More Heroquest! Advanced Armory, Monks, and More!
body:
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=PtL2ZgPSF5o

Daniel (@dungeondive) is back with more HeroQuest — and promises more throughout 2024. This episode covers the Advanced Armory supplement, the Monk hero pack, and assorted additions that expand the base game's character options and equipment. It's a shopping trip through HeroQuest's growing ecosystem.

The review examines what each supplement actually adds to gameplay versus what's just nice to have. For solo players especially, new hero types and equipment cards change the calculus of party composition and dungeon strategy. Daniel sorts the essential from the optional with his usual candour.

----

When a game you love keeps releasing expansions, are you a completionist or do you pick and choose?
